---
title: "TenSure: Fuzzing Sparse Tensor Compilers"
date: 2026-02-24
year: 2026
pdf: "https://www.ndss-symposium.org/wp-content/uploads/fuzzing2026-6.pdf"
venue: "FUZZING 2026"
award: ""
code: "https://github.com/KabilanMA/TenSure"
slides: "files/slides/fuzzing2026.pptx"
preprint: "https://arxiv.org/pdf/2603.18372v1"
video: ""
author:
  - name: Kabilan Mahathevan
  - name: Yining Zhang
  - name: Muhammad Ali Gulzar
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
categories:
  - Workshop
description: ""
---
